headline: Vistra (VST) Valuation Check After Dual Investment Grade Upgrades And Rising AI Power Demand
summary: Vistra (VST) is back in focus after Fitch Ratings upgraded its long term issuer default rating to investment grade, following a similar move by S&P Global Ratings in December 2025. See our latest analysis for Vistra. The Fitch investment grade upgrade comes after a choppy period for Vistra's share price, with a 1 day share price return of 1.44% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 32.76%. The very large 3 and 5 year total shareholder returns point to momentum that has been strong over a...

headline: Analysts Rally Behind These Nuclear Leaders As White House Unveils Expansion Blitz
summary: Analysts gave favorable comments on nuclear energy suppliers Constellation Energy and Vistra, as the Trump administration launched an initiative to boost its goal of quadrupling U.S. nuclear power.  BNP Paribas initiated coverage of Constellation Energy with an outperform rating and 407 price target Wednesday, according to MT Newswires.  It is the latest bullish recommendation for Constellation, joining 14 other analysts who have buy or outperform ratings.

headline: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Batteries Added to Vistra Grid Program
summary: Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) is among the 11 Most Undervalued Renewable Energy Stocks to Invest In. The initiative will further scale Vistra’s residential virtual power plant and help strengthen grid reliability across Texas. The program, known […]
